# Updated Story

This updated story traces how a static site generator publishes linked notes, keeps navigation stable, exposes summaries for previews, and preserves reader-facing metadata across pages. The paragraph adds enough visible words to produce a reading-time label without relying on hidden markup or code samples.

## Overview

The overview section links to [[reference-guide|Reference Guide]], [[field-notes|Field Notes]], and [[roadmap|Roadmap]] so popovers, breadcrumbs, related articles, and folder pages all have visible destinations.
